text: The commissioner is hereby empowered to make such rules and regulations as he may deem necessary to carry out the provisions of this article.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 11
#### Article 48. Registration of Vessels
##### § 2258 — Rules and regulations

The commissioner is hereby empowered to make such rules and regulations as he may deem necessary to carry out the provisions of this article.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: The commissioner is hereby empowered to make such rules and regulations as he may deem necessary to carry out the provisions of this article.
